    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Questions
    KnowledgeKeepers.getQuest()
    Returns the current Questions object assigned to this KnowledgeKeeper.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    KnowledgeKeepers.setQuest(Questions quest)

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EasyQuestions
    Represents an easy-level question box that appears in the game.

    HardQuestions
    Represents a hard-level question box that appears in the game.

    MidQuestions
    Represents a medium-level question box in the game.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<Questions>
    Questions.getEasyQuestions()
    Returns the list of easy questions.
    static List<Questions>
    Questions.getHardQuestions()
    Returns the list of hard questions.
    static List<Questions>
    Questions.getMidQuestions()
    Returns the list of medium questions.
